name: Commit Helper
description: Generates conventional commit messages based on staged changes with smart categorization
longDescription:
Commit Helper analyzes your staged git changes and generates well-formatted conventional commit messages. It automatically detects the type of change (feat, fix, docs, refactor, etc.) and creates descriptive commit messages following best practices.

## Usage

Simply run `/commit` after staging your changes, and the skill will analyze the diff and suggest an appropriate commit message.

## Features

- Automatic change type detection
- Conventional commit format
- Multi-file change summarization
- Breaking change detection

commit.description: Generate a conventional commit message for staged changes
commit.prompt: Analyze the staged git changes and generate a conventional commit message. Use the format: <type>(<scope>): <description>. Types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore.

installation.instructions: Add the following to your Claude Code settings.json under the 'skills' key
